calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 10, 1993 is admitted to probate. Zions Bancorporation, N.A. by Christian Heinrich is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 1, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is to be filed one week prior to the hearing date.Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Rene A. Chouteau. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
